isolation.gitRepos: Fresh git repos initialized per test

steps.action: Create mission with plan containing milestone m1 and 3 assertions
steps.expected: Mission created with assertions in pending state
steps.observed: Mission 2026-03-30-001 created with 3 assertions: f1-assertion-1, f1-assertion-2, f2-assertion-1 all pending

steps.expected: Assertion transitions to waived state with waivedReason recorded
steps.observed: [ok] Assertion updated: f1-assertion-2, Status: waived, Waived Reason: Not applicable for this implementation

steps.expected: Seal succeeds with all terminal assertions (passed/waived)
steps.observed: Milestone sealed successfully. JSON output: {"sealed": true, "milestone": {"id": "m1"...}}
Milestone m1 shows sealedAt timestamp, status reflects completion

evidence.cliOutput: Terminal output showing assertion updates and seal success

steps.action: Create mission with plan containing milestone m1 and 3 assertions
steps.expected: Mission created with assertions in pending state
steps.observed: Mission 2026-03-30-001 created with 3 assertions: f1-assertion-1, f1-assertion-2, f2-assertion-1 all pending

steps.action: Update only f1-assertion-1 to 'passed', leave others pending
steps.expected: One assertion passed, two remain pending
steps.observed: f1-assertion-1: passed, f1-assertion-2: pending, f2-assertion-1: pending

steps.expected: Seal fails with exit code 1 and JSON error with blocking assertion IDs
steps.observed: Exit code 1, JSON error: {"error": "Cannot seal milestone m1: 2 assertion(s) not in terminal state", "hints": ["Blocking assertions (2): f1-assertion-2, f2-assertion-1", ...]}

steps.expected: Seal fails with human-readable error showing blocking IDs
steps.observed: [!] Cannot seal milestone m1: 2 assertion(s) not in terminal state. Blocking assertions (2): f1-assertion-2, f2-assertion-1

evidence.cliOutput: Terminal output showing seal failure with blocking assertion IDs listed
evidence.jsonOutput: {"error": "Cannot seal milestone m1: 2 assertion(s) not in terminal state", "hints": ["Blocking assertions (2): f1-assertion-2, f2-assertion-1", "All assertions must be 'passed' or 'waived' to seal a milestone.", ...]}

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed (0 failed, 0 blocked). VAL-MILESTONE-002 verified milestone seal succeeds when all assertions are in terminal states (passed/waived). VAL-MILESTONE-003 verified failed seal attempts correctly identify the specific blocking assertion IDs in both JSON and text output formats.
